title: Fill Missing Data
description:
Write a solution to fill in the missing value as 0 in the quantity column.
The result format is in the following example.

examples.example_text:
DataFrame products
+-------------+--------+
| Column Name | Type   |
+-------------+--------+
| name        | object |
| quantity    | int    |
| price       | int    |
+-------------+--------+

hints: Consider using a build-in function in pandas library to fill the missing values of specified columns.
